scenarios.name: Mobile share capture
linkedDoD: POST handler at /pwa/share processes share target data
URL and text captured via existing API
Success/error feedback displayed
Auto-close and return to source app

scenarios.name: Right-click capture
scenarios.deferralReason: Browser extension context-menu behaviour is implemented in web/extension/background.js (smackerel-save-page handler) but is exercised only via manual browser-extension validation; no automated extension test harness exists in this repo.
linkedDoD: Context menu "Save to Smackerel" registered
Toolbar button captures current page with one click
Desktop notification confirms capture

scenarios.name: Selected text capture
scenarios.deferralReason: Extension selection-capture branch (smackerel-save-selection + info.selectionText) is implemented but verified only via manual extension validation; no automated extension test harness exists in this repo.
linkedDoD: Context menu "Save with selection" when text selected

scenarios.name: Offline capture queued
scenarios.deferralReason: Offline IndexedDB queue (CaptureQueue) is implemented in web/extension/lib/queue.js and web/pwa/lib/queue.js with ServiceWorker sync, but no JS test harness exists in this Go repo; verified via manual offline-capture validation.
linkedDoD: IndexedDB queue stores pending captures
Queue survives page close and browser restart
Automatic sync on connectivity restore
Queue status visible in extension popup and PWA settings

scenarios.name: Auth failure preserves queue
scenarios.deferralReason: 401-preserve-queue branch in queue.js flush() is implemented (sets authFailed flag, leaves items intact) but verified only via manual extension validation; no automated extension test harness in this repo.
linkedDoD: 401 errors preserve queue and signal re-auth

scenarios.name: Extension setup with validation
scenarios.deferralReason: Extension setup form + Test Connection flow against /api/health is implemented in popup.js but verified only via manual extension validation; no automated extension test harness in this repo.
linkedDoD: Setup form with Server URL + Auth Token fields
"Test Connection" validates via /api/health

scenarios.name: HTTP security warning
scenarios.deferralReason: Insecure-HTTP warning banner is implemented in popup.js URL validation but verified only via manual extension validation; no automated extension test harness in this repo.
linkedDoD: HTTP URL triggers insecure-connection warning banner

scenarios.name: PWA exposes share target on mobile install
scenarios.deferralReason: PWA manifest, service worker, and shell are implemented under web/pwa/ but PWA installability and OS share-sheet integration are verified only via manual mobile-browser validation; no automated PWA install/share-sheet harness exists in this Go repo.
linkedDoD: pwa/manifest.json with name, icons, share_target
Service worker caches static assets
PWA installable on Android Chrome and iOS Safari
Share target appears in OS share sheet after install

scenarios.name: Chrome extension popup shows current page title and URL with persisted auth token
scenarios.deferralReason: Chrome MV3 extension core (manifest, popup tab/title/URL rendering, chrome.storage.local auth persistence, background service worker capture dispatch) is implemented in web/extension/ but verified only via manual extension validation; no automated extension test harness exists in this repo.
linkedDoD: Extension installs on Chrome via developer mode
Popup shows current page title and URL
Auth token persisted in secure storage
Background service worker handles capture requests

scenarios.name: Firefox extension parity via WebExtension polyfill
scenarios.deferralReason: Firefox WebExtension parity (browser_specific_settings.gecko, browser-polyfill bridging chrome.* to Promise-based browser.*, parity for context menu and popup) is implemented but verified only via manual Firefox extension validation; no automated cross-browser extension test harness exists in this repo.
linkedDoD: Extension loads in Firefox without errors
browser.* API used with Chrome polyfill
Firefox-specific manifest fields added (browser_specific_settings)
Context menu and popup work identically to Chrome
